metadata.title: Carlos HOUNSINOU — Integrated Systems Architect & M&E Specialist
metadata.description: Carlos Hounsinou, Project Engineering Officer at the OIF. Expert in monitoring, evaluation and platform architecture for international institutions, donors and organizations.
metadata.keywords: monitoring evaluation, project engineering, OIF, systems architect, M&E consultant, Carlos Hounsinou

hero.tag: Project Engineering Officer · International Organisation of La Francophonie

items: CIHR · Canadian Institutes of Health Research

about.p1: A trained statistical engineer with a Master's in Project Management, I have built a rare expertise at the intersection of three worlds: monitoring & evaluation methodology, data engineering, and product design.
about.p2Part1: From Benin to Paris, via Belgium, I now serve the
about.p2Part2: as Project Engineering Officer — after designing platforms for international donors and launching my own SaaS product. A path that taught me to design, specify and ship systems that last.

timeline.title: Architect of M&E Modernisation
timeline.org: Organisation Internationale de la Francophonie · Paris
timeline.description: Designing an institutional platform to digitalise the steering of an international programme portfolio. From specification to governance, I am structuring a system that will transform decision-making in the field.

timeline.title: Growth Catalyst · Data Strategy
timeline.description: Built the group's data-driven steering system. Designed estimation tools and financial KPIs (cost, margin, profitability). Market intelligence and expansion into new segments.

timeline.title: Systems Designer for EU Donors
timeline.org: IBF International Consulting · RePaSOC Programme · Belgium & Benin
timeline.description: Implementation of two complete web platforms for monitoring and evaluation under the RePaSOC programme, funded by the European Union (consortium IBF International Consulting / NIRAS / QUAREIN). Refinement of the global logical framework, design and online deployment of the computerised system, training of operators (CPSC, Régie, MdSC, GIZ) and Technical Assistants.

timeline.title: Architect of Programming Tools
timeline.description: International Volunteer of La Francophonie (VIF) at the Coordination Service for Off-Site Units. Design and deployment of indicator monitoring tools for the 2019-2022 four-year programming. Support to national structures (RESIFS) on the complete strategic planning cycle.

timeline.title: Statistician · Health Research
timeline.description: Statistician within the Project Coordination of CHU de Québec in Benin, funded by the Canadian Institutes of Health Research (CIHR) and the Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation. Design of databases for public health research and improvement of living conditions of vulnerable populations ('Health Equity' project).

timeline.title: Builder of Territorial M&E Systems
timeline.description: Built the monitoring system for the Decennial Education Plan. Designed Access tools for the Municipal Development Plan (PDC) monitoring and financial management.

flagship.intro: An institutional platform for a multilateral organisation, two monitoring tools for European Union-funded programmes, a SaaS product of my own, and a territorial governance platform. Each project illustrates my ability to design and deliver integrated systems — from strategic scoping to operational deployment.

card1.title: Programme portfolio steering platform
card1.description: Design and specification of a secure web platform for monitoring & evaluation of an international programme portfolio, deployed for a multilateral francophone organisation.

card2.title: Cap Citoyen · French civic exam preparation
card2.description: Web and mobile platform for preparing the French civic naturalisation exam, made mandatory in January 2026. Complete design: thematic learning paths, flashcards mode, audio content, exam simulation and peer community. Integrated AI Coach (Anthropic API and GPT-4o-mini).
card2.capImageAlt: Cap Citoyen app screenshot — home screen with stats

card3.title: Monitoring platforms · EU-funded projects
card3.description: Consulting mission for IBF International Consulting: design and implementation of two web platforms dedicated to monitoring & evaluation of European Union-funded projects. Steering tools for coordinators, donors and implementing partners.

card4.title: Indicator-based steering platform
card4.description: Design and development of a secure web platform for data-driven municipal development steering. Indicator framework aligned with the Municipal Development Plan, certification workflow, audit trail and differentiated access by role.

stats.intro: Beyond titles, what counts are the tools deployed, the projects delivered, the teams trained. Here is what a field career represents.

items.label: I. Tools
items.description: Monitoring & evaluation tools designed, including 46 in VBA-Excel and 19 in Access

items.label: II. Projects
items.description: Development projects planned and managed across multiple organisations

items.label: III. CSOs
items.description: Civil society organisations supported in planning & M&E

items.label: IV. Trainings
items.description: Workshops delivered in 4 countries on various themes

expertise.intro: From methodological framing to software production. Every mission mobilises at least two of these pillars — that is what makes the difference.

feature.label: I. Main pillar
feature.title: Integrated systems architecture for Monitoring & Evaluation
feature.description: Design of complete platforms aligned with Results-Based Management. From logical framework to technical specifications, including data governance and security.

tiles.label: II
tiles.title: Data analytics & Business Intelligence
tiles.description: Advanced statistical analysis, dashboards, data valorisation.

tiles.label: III
tiles.title: SaaS solutions & digital products
tiles.description: Design and launch of web/mobile platforms, AI integration.

tiles.label: IV
tiles.title: No-Code tools & automation
tiles.description: Rapid deployment of business applications, process automation.

tiles.label: V
tiles.title: Training & capacity building
tiles.description: Knowledge transfer through practice. Tailor-made modules, individual coaching.

testimonial.quote: Carlos transformed our monitoring & evaluation system. His methodological rigor combined with his mastery of digital tools enabled us to gain clarity and responsiveness in steering our projects.
testimonial.author: [To complete]

contact.intro: NGO, donor, company or public institution: a first 30-minute conversation to understand your needs and identify the levers of action — no commitment.

form.step3Question: What would you like to discuss?
form.step4Placeholder: A few lines is enough — we will go deeper during the conversation.
form.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent. I will reply within 24 to 48 working hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. You can also reach me directly at carlos.hounsinou@outlook.fr.
